tools.name: liveCurrencyRateConversion.convertcurrency
tools.description: Provide an amount in one currency (EUR, GBP, CNY, JPY, AUD, etc.), and also a second currency to convert it to. The API will return the result using current foreign exchange rates. See the API home page for a list of all supported currencies.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
